text: Spaced repetitionis anevidence-based learningtechnique {{c1::that}} is usually performed withflashcards.
usage:
Context: Spaced repetitionis anevidence-based learningtechnique that is usually performed withflashcards.
  • Source: Spaced repetition - Wikipedia

text: Newly introduced and more difficult flashcards are shown more frequently, while older and {{c1::less}} difficult flashcards are shown {{c1::less}} frequently in order to exploit the psychologicalspacing effect.
usage:
Context: Newly introduced and more difficult flashcards are shown more frequently, while older and less difficult flashcards are shown less frequently in order to exploit the psychologicalspacing effect.
  • Source: Spaced repetition - Wikipedia

text: The use of spaced repetition has been {{c1::proven}} to increase the rate of learning.[1]
usage:
Context: The use of spaced repetition has been proven to increase the rate of learning.[1]
  • Source: Spaced repetition - Wikipedia

text: Although the principle is useful in many {{c1::contexts}}, spaced repetition is commonly applied in {{c1::contexts}} in which a learner must acquire many items and retain them indefinitely in memory.
usage:
Context: Although the principle is useful in many contexts, spaced repetition is commonly applied in contexts in which a learner must acquire many items and retain them indefinitely in memory.
  • Source: Spaced repetition - Wikipedia

text: It is, therefore, well suited for the {{c1::problem}} ofvocabularyacquisition in the course of second-language learning.
usage:
Context: It is, therefore, well suited for the problem ofvocabularyacquisition in the course of second-language learning.
  • Source: Spaced repetition - Wikipedia
